name: Meta-Goal M-1 (sustainable adaptive coherence)
description: Order counts as beneficial only if it supports flourishing without suppressing autonomy/justice/ecology; also the oversight floor

name: Flourishing Metrics Framework
description: Physical/Cognitive-Emotional/Social-Justice/Ecological metric families; full vector preserved, never scalar-collapsed

name: four axes
description: Physical/Cognitive-Emotional/Social-Justice/Ecological metric families; full vector preserved, never scalar-collapsed

name: Annex A
description: Physical/Cognitive-Emotional/Social-Justice/Ecological metric families; full vector preserved, never scalar-collapsed

name: Trade-off log schema
description: {axis, metric, value, CI} record per axis

name: 1+4 minimal-and-adequate set + full normative conformance surface
description: Closed invariant (scores + 4 composers) reported beside the larger interop surface a 2nd implementer must match

name: federation_keys.key_id
description: Enrolled identity that can self-sign; hex(sha256(ed25519_pubkey))

name: canonical-hash identifier + wire form + preimage
description: Tagged id for un-enrolled external party: canonical:{hashalg}:{hex} over {platform}:{entity_kind}:{id}

name: canonical_binding
description: Retroactive claim promoting a canonical-hash to a real key_id

name: cross-attestation / federation_keys row
description: Entity partly constituted by attestations naming it; self-signature alone != identity

name: Ubuntu relational-anthropology substrate
description: The relation IS the person; bars any Cartesian privileged-shortcut primitive

name: identity_type-as-set
description: identity_type is a SET of roles; reserved-prefix gates by set membership

name: NodeCode
description: Human-shareable CIRIS-V1- base32 + CRC-16 render of a key_id (DNS-free bootstrap)

name: WHO fields (issuer key_id / signature / witness_relation)
description: Emitter identity + signature + witness relation (+ optional steward sign-off)

name: hardware-class taxonomy
description: Enum of signer hardware with trust-multipliers; treated as producer claim

name: hardware_class (self-asserted)
description: Enum of signer hardware with trust-multipliers; treated as producer claim

name: consent_role enum
description: Counter-RII gate role (BaseRole/Peer/AuthorizedReview)

name: CEG (CIRIS Epistemic Grammar)
description: Signed compositional wire language for claims/authority/consent/governance/addressing/settlement

name: CEWP
description: Emergent P2P network of CEG-speaking nodes; no steward/root/load-bearing instance

name: CEWPOS
description: Emergent P2P network of CEG-speaking nodes; no steward/root/load-bearing instance

name: Fabric node
description: Headless CEG participant that attests/stores/transports but does NOT reason (agent = node + brain)

name: Contribution (universal envelope)
description: Signed unit on the wire carrying envelope + typed payload

name: envelope
description: Accountability wrapper binding the claim to evidence, revocation authority, conditions

name: Attestation (typed claim content)
description: Machine-readable claim: WHO / WHAT-KIND / HOW-STRONG / WHAT-BASED-ON

name: scores Attestation
description: The single workhorse primitive: signed claim about an entity on a named dimension

name: attestation_type
description: Discriminator over the five wire primitives

name: primitive set (1+4)
description: scores + delegates_to/supersedes/withdraws/recants — minimal-and-adequate

name: four structural composers
description: scores + delegates_to/supersedes/withdraws/recants — minimal-and-adequate

name: delegates_to
description: A authorizes B in bounded scope {delegated_scope, purpose, valid_from/until}

name: supersedes
description: Replaces a prior row by same attester {references_attestation_id, reason, differs_in}

name: withdraws (+ 4 admission authority paths)
description: Retracts without claiming falsity; self/subject/canonical-proxy/delegate gate it

name: recants
description: Admits a prior attestation false at issuance {reason, what_was_false} (original attester only)

name: inter-attestation relations (8)
description: 4 structural + 4 emergent (Standalone/Refers-to/Supersedes/Contradicts/Withdraws/Recants/Clarifies/Delegated)

name: eight reasoning axes
description: Consumer vocabulary (Polarity/Object/Time/Epistemic/Reversibility/Stake/Scope/Relations) — NOT wire fields

name: Scope axis values
description: self/family/community/affiliations/species/biosphere/federation

name: attesting_key_id
description: Attester's and subject's federation_keys.key_id

name: attested_key_id
description: Attester's and subject's federation_keys.key_id

name: dimension
description: Canonical namespace prefix + scoped leaf (TEXT, parsed vs CC 3.1 map)

name: score
description: Polarity-signed strength in [-1,+1]; attester's own confidence [0,1]

name: confidence
description: Polarity-signed strength in [-1,+1]; attester's own confidence [0,1]

name: context
description: Free-form scoping; not parsed by substrate

name: evidence_refs
description: Seq-ordered URIs/content-hashes; some dimensions require non-empty; absorb-anywhere surface

name: valid_until
description: ISO-8601 staleness bound (consumer-policy), independent of substrate expiry

name: epistemic_mode
description: direct|crypto|hearsay|derivative|appeal (default direct)

name: witness_relation
description: self|external|derived (default external; anti self-attestation-gaming)

name: oversight_mode
description: HITL|HOTL|HOOTL of producing agent — a fabric field, not an agent mechanism

name: occurrence_id
description: Multi-occurrence fleet self-assertion (primary|shared|replica)

name: occurrence_count
description: Multi-occurrence fleet self-assertion (primary|shared|replica)

name: occurrence_role
description: Multi-occurrence fleet self-assertion (primary|shared|replica)

name: stake
description: free|reputational|capital|cryptoeconomic (default reputational)

name: community_id
description: Visibility-gating ids; REQUIRED iff cohort_scope==community/family

name: family_id
description: Visibility-gating ids; REQUIRED iff cohort_scope==community/family

name: subject_key_ids

name: cohort_scope

name: delivery_mode
description: pull|push - roster opt-in - full|from_join admission history

description: pull|push - roster opt-in - full|from_join admission history

name: history_on_join
description: pull|push - roster opt-in - full|from_join admission history

description: Disjoint-union vocabulary (83 families, 8 owners); each carries polarity + reserved?
